'''Fossco''' was a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], and served as one of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] accountants. During a visit to [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]], he was the first individual to find Warden [[Dewt Kluskine]]'s dead body.
